title: Trip Support Flights
description: Advanced flight search and booking engine integration.

content.overview: Trip Support is a major player in the travel industry. This project focused on enhancing their flight booking capabilities by integrating multiple GDS and LCC providers into a unified, high-performance search engine.
content.challenge: Integrating diverse flight data sources while maintaining fast search speeds and accurate pricing was a significant technical hurdle. The UI also needed to handle complex filtering and multi-city itineraries.
content.solution: We implemented a microservices architecture to handle API integrations, optimized search algorithms for speed, and designed a user-friendly interface that simplifies the flight selection process.
content.results: The enhanced flight engine led to a 30% increase in conversion rates and provided users with a much wider range of flight options and competitive pricing.
